## Summary

Describe the feature or API you want to add.

## Problem Statement

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed API

Describe the ideal call site or usage shape.

// Example usage

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Scope

## Additional Context

Add related examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.
